name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Fresno's Swift Title Loans at 2111 W Shaw Avenue, Suite A offers title loans and payday advances in CA.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates at 2111 W Shaw Avenue, Suite A in Fresno, CA, located in the central part of the city. This standalone storefront is accessible during extended weekday hours (Monday–Friday, 9 AM to 7 PM) and Saturday mornings (10 AM to 5 PM), closing on Sundays. If you're on Fresno's west side near Shaw Avenue, this location is convenient for walk-in service.

At this Fresno location, Swift Title Loans offers title loans and payday advances. The branch can process applications quickly and provide same-day or next-day funding depending on your eligibility. Contact the store directly for current rates, terms, and whether your vehicle or situation qualifies for their title lending program.

For Fresno residents needing emergency cash, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of residence, and your vehicle title (if applying for a title loan). The extended hours on weekdays make this Fresno branch accessible for working people. Swift Title Loans focuses on providing fast lending solutions when traditional banks can't help.
address: 2111 W Shaw Ave STE A, Fresno, CA 93711

company_info.headquarters: 2111 W Shaw Ave STE A, Fresno, CA 93711

pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
Loan range of $100–$50,000 accommodates both emergency and larger cash needs
Explicitly welcomes applicants with bad credit history and past bankruptcies
Personalized service model with patient staff guidance through paperwork
256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for online applications
Extended Saturday hours (10am–5pm) for working-class accessibility
Consistent customer reports of transparent terms and professional demeanor
cons: Title-secured structure means vehicle is at risk if loan defaults
Limited payment plan options according to multiple customer suggestions
Poor external signage creates confusion for first-time visitors
No mobile app or digital payment management tools available
Limited parking and crowded lot during busy hours
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or bankruptcy history needing emergency cash within 24 hours
Vehicle owners needing $500–$5,000 quickly for unexpected expenses
Borrowers seeking alternatives to payday loans who own a paid-off or low-lien vehicle
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for consumers with damaged credit who need emergency cash quickly and own a vehicle with available title equity. The main caveat is that defaulting on the loan puts the vehicle at risk of repossession, and the lack of flexible payment plans and digital tools may complicate managing the debt.
services: In-person loan processing and paperwork assistance
Borrower retains vehicle possession during loan term
meta_description: Swift Title Loans at 2111 W Shaw Ave, Fresno, CA. Fast title loans and payday advances for CA residents.
